description_long: This clock features a robust, steampunk-inspired design with a large circular face encased in a metallic housing adorned with rivets and mesh grilles. The face is marked with bold numerals and two prominent hands, all set against a weathered, cream-colored background. Flanking the main body are cylindrical and pipe-like elements, suggesting a mechanical or industrial function, while the base is a sturdy, dark platform with visible bolts and intricate plumbing details. Brass and bronze tones dominate the exterior, giving it a vintage, machined appearance. The rear of the clock displays additional mechanical features, including vents and access panels, enhancing its utilitarian aesthetic. This object exudes a sense of mechanical complexity and durability, making it a striking feature in any urban or industrial setting.
description: A large, steampunk-style clock with a metallic, riveted housing, bold numerals, and intricate mechanical details on a sturdy base. Brass and bronze tones dominate its industrial, vintage appearance.
description_view_0: Side view showing the cylindrical housing, mesh grille, and pipework details on the base.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular clock face with bold numerals and hands, flanked by mechanical elements.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the cylindrical housing and mesh grille, with visible pipes and bolts.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying mechanical access panels, vents, and the complex structure of the base.
attribute_face_design: Circular face with bold black numerals, two hands, and a weathered cream background, encased in a metallic frame.
